items.name_cn:
=
This new LuLu bag is absolutely stunning. I was captivated by this crescent bag at first sight, and the sophistication is maxed out. It is super super good-looking ✨. It elevates your look instantly, and the best part is the bag shape!
Can be salty or sweet, suitable for commuting, dates, crossbody, or shoulder bag. It looks great in all styles, and the capacity is completely sufficient for daily use. Paired with a hoodie, it is very casual and relaxed. It is truly versatile!
This bag also brings an effortless sense of relaxation.
Specs: 21x24×5 cm, moderate size
Model: 120723

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_en: 【Exclusive Real Shot M13992 Black/Color】Takashi Murakami Collaboration Series. This Zippy coin wallet is made of Monogram canvas and is practical, featuring a spacious compartment, a zip coin pocket, and multiple credit card slots. Named for its secure wrap-around zip, it features a grained leather lining. Fully functional, it can also be used as a clutch. 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm (Length x Height x Width)

items.name_en: 💕【New】The circular interlocking double-G motif draws inspiration from the brand's heritage, adding elegance to leather accessories as always. This black leather card case brings the charm of the 1970s style to life. It is meticulously designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
items.name_cn:
💕【New】The circular interlocking double-G motif draws inspiration from the brand's heritage, adding elegance to leather accessories as always. This black leather card case brings the charm of the 1970s style to life. It is meticulously designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
Black leather
Taffeta lining
Enamel circular interlocking details
Interior: card slots, 1 coin pocket
Snap closure
Model: 818795
Open dimensions: 22cm (W) x 9cm (H); Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 80g
Color: Black full leather/Original leather
Italian creation

items.name_en: 💕【New】The GG Emblem collection reinterprets the brand's iconic pattern with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a collectible for years to come. This beige and white shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from the new GG monogram fabric. Finished with grey-green leather trim and Gucci embossed logo.
items.name_cn:
💕【New】The GG Emblem collection reinterprets the brand's iconic pattern with creative design and innovative functions, crafted as a collectible for years to come. This beige and white shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from the new GG monogram fabric. Finished with grey-green leather trim and Gucci embossed logo.
Grey-green and grey-green new GG monogram coated fabric
Grey-green leather trim
Webbing taffeta lining
Gucci embossed
Includes D-ring for hanging removable items
Contrasting stitching
Interior: 1 zip pocket, multiple card slots with flat pockets
Adjustable shoulder strap (52cm)
Snap closure
Color: 820688
Dimensions: 20cm (W) x 12.5cm (H) x 5cm (D)
Weight: approx. 323g
Color: Grey-green PVC/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💕《Includes full original green box packaging》💕【New】GG Emblem Oversized Mini Shoulder Bag
items.name_cn:
💕《Includes full original green box packaging》💕【New】GG Emblem Oversized Mini Shoulder Bag
The new GG Emblem series reinterprets the brand's timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship. This beige and dark brown oversized mini shoulder bag reinterprets the brand's new small accessories collection, crafted from selected new GG monogram canvas. Carefully designed with multiple compartments, cleverly incorporating D-rings for hanging items.
◇Beige and dark brown new GG monogram coated canvas
. Brown leather trim
◇Taffeta lining
◇ Gucci embossed
◇Also comes with D-rings for hanging removable items
. Interior: 1 zip pocket, multiple card slots with flat pockets
. Adjustable shoulder strap (52cm high)
. Snap closure
Model: 820688.
Dimensions: 20(L) x 12.5(W) x 5(D)
Color: Beige PVC/Original leather.
Italian creation
